meaning: Associated Society of Locomotive Engineers and Firemen (英国)火车司机与司炉联合会
examples: The driver's union Aslef said it was "sympathetic" over the problems being faced by London Midland.
Train drivers union Aslef, however, said it was impossible to rule out further shortages in future.
Mick Rix, general secretary of Aslef, said he welcomed the intervention of the mayor.
